message:
feat(ffs-core): expand ext4 open/validate pipeline (bd-3nc)

Enrich Ext4Geometry with block_size, inodes_count, inodes_per_group,
first_ino, inode_size, and has_metadata_csum so downstream code has
all pre-computed fields without re-reading the superblock.

Expand parse_error_to_ffs mapping to route new geometry validation
fields (desc_size, first_data_block, blocks_count, inodes_count) to
InvalidGeometry instead of generic Format errors.

Add 4 new tests covering expanded error mapping, geometry field
population, 1K block support, and serialization round-trip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
